headline: A Look At United Rentals (URI) Valuation After Record Q1 Results And Higher 2026 Outlook
summary: United Rentals (URI) is back in focus after reporting record first quarter revenue, EBITDA, and earnings per share. The company lifted its 2026 sales and profit outlook and highlighted strength in construction and infrastructure demand. See our latest analysis for United Rentals. The strong first quarter update and higher 2026 outlook have been met with a sharp re-rating in the shares. A 7-day share price return of 22.39% and a 1-year total shareholder return of 55.15% point to building...
